description:
Offered: every semester
This course continues from Basic Music Theory and involves the further study of chords, inversions, key relationships and the principles of modulation. Emphasis is placed on analysis in multiple genres, including classical, jazz and pop/rock. The fundamentals of chorale-style voice leading are also examined.
Prerequisite(s): MUSC 2200 or permission of instructor.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, FA, IHIP, PL
